data.description:
Currently the large 'Fractal' wordmark in the Footer's branding band (src/components/layout/Footer.tsx) is a static <div>. Make it a wouter <Link href="/">, so clicking it returns to the home page from any inner page. Keep the existing typography (Jacquard 24, clamp size, letter spacing) and add a subtle hover affordance (color shift or underline) so users discover it's interactive.

Why: standard web convention — site wordmarks in nav/footer are home-links. Without this, users on an inner page have to use the navbar or browser back button to get home.

How to apply: small change, plan is one line: swap the <div> for a wouter <Link> and add hover styling.
data.title: Footer Fractal wordmark links to home
